ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #10, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-30-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sterling Ross for petitioner Faith Fong.

Mr. Ross advised the Court that he had filed a supplement to the petition which addressed the fair market value of the items of personal property. He added that the declaration stating the FMV figures in a schedule was filed on Friday, June 10th. The matter was taken under submission.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING , REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-05-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sterling Ross for and with Donald Fong and for Faith Fong. Arina Fong in Propria Persona.

The Court questioned who prepared the accounting. Mr. Sterling stated that Arina prepared the accounting without a fee and then his firm reviewed it, and that the firm had some input with regard to revision of the accounting. The Court denied the request for ongoing estimated fees and expressed concern with regard to 34 hours of time for the accounting when it was prepared by Arina. Mr. Sterling stated that the estimate of fees included time from the petition to this hearing. The Court also raised the issue of having a Trust case number assigned for the Special Needs Trust. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #5, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-31-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Sterling Ross appearing for and with trustees. Court questions the increased bond. Counsel has the bond in his office and he will file the $110,000.00 bond. Court is approving the reimbursement of expenditures. Court is not approving future expenditures now. Court questions why the trustees have not taken their approved fees. The trustees was advised by the accountant that it is not beneficial to either parties to take the fees at this time. Accounting is approved. Order signed. Clerk is holding the order until the filing of the increasd bond. Future accounting date is set on 2/25/08. Counsel will file a supplement for approval of additional fees. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
